summary: Generate mode testing complete for new consignment agreement features. All features tested successfully: Custom profit split field, Additional information field, Photo upload API, Collapsible sections in update form, Signature/Date fields, and Payment validation (Check doesn't require details). 16 backend tests and 16 frontend E2E tests all passed.

custom_profit_split_new_form.description: Custom Profit Split field in new agreement form works correctly

additional_info_new_form.description: Additional Information field in new agreement form works correctly

photo_upload_api.description: Photo upload endpoint /api/forms/upload-photos works correctly for single and multiple photos

photo_upload_ui.description: Photo upload UI elements present in both forms

update_form_collapsible_sections.description: Collapsible sections for Contact Info, Payment Method, and Add Items work correctly

signature_date_update_form.description: Signature and Date fields present and functional in update form

payment_validation_check.description: Check payment method doesn't require payment details

payment_validation_other_methods.description: Venmo, PayPal, Zelle, CashApp, Apple Pay require payment details

seed_data_creation: Used existing testuser@example.com for update form tests. Created new test agreements for backend tests (auto-cleaned via unique emails).
context_for_next_testing_agent: New consignment features all working: Custom profit split, Additional info, Photo upload, Collapsible update sections, Signature/Date fields. Test file consignment-features.spec.ts covers all new features. Backend test file test_consignment_features.py covers API endpoints. Helper function skipSplashScreen added to fixtures for handling splash screen.
